metadata.title: Geo Renovations - Sandblasting, Flooring & Gardening
metadata.description: Geo Renovations specializes in sandblasting, air pressure paint removal, flooring, and gardening services. Located in France near the Geneva border, we provide reliable and affordable solutions for clients in both France and Geneva.

hero.title2: Top-notch sandblasting, flooring & gardening at fair rates

componentOne.text2: For 15 years, Geo Renovations has been a trusted name in home and business renovations. Based in France near the Geneva border, we excel in sandblasting, flooring, and gardening, ensuring quality, efficiency, and customer satisfaction.

componentSix.text: We believe in building a dedicated team where everyone contributes with their expertise and passion. Join us to work in an inspiring environment and grow your skills!

metadata.title: Latest Sandblasting & Flooring Projects
metadata.description: Stay updated on our recent renovation projects, including sandblasting, flooring, and gardening. See how we bring spaces back to life.

metadata.title: Expert Renovation Services
metadata.description: Get in touch for professional sandblasting, flooring installation, and gardening solutions tailored to your needs in France and Geneva.

metadata.title: Contact Geo Renovations
metadata.description: Reach out to us for consultations or inquiries regarding sandblasting, flooring, and gardening services in France and Geneva.

contactForm.title3: With our expertise in flooring and gardening, we ensure every detail is handled efficiently. Our tailored solutions are designed to exceed expectations and create functional outdoor spaces.

metadata.title: Consult Geo Renovations
metadata.description: Book a consultation with Geo Renovations and start transforming your property with our specialized services.

componentSeven.title2: Your reliable partner for expert renovation, sandblasting, flooring, and landscaping services.
